debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

proof:
rw [show log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b = (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) by ring]
  apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := fun h ↦ this (h ▸ hx)
    convert (hasDerivAt_log hx0).sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx0) using 1
    · ext; simp [one_div]
    · field_simp [hx0]; ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const continuousOn_id
      intro x hx h; exact this (h ▸ hx)
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuousOn_id.pow 2)
      intro x hx h; exact this (pow_eq_zero h ▸ hx)
successful_attempts:
rw [show log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b = (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a) by ring]
  apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := fun h ↦ this (h ▸ hx)
    convert (hasDerivAt_log hx0).sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx0) using 1
    · ext; simp [one_div]
    · field_simp [hx0]; ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const continuousOn_id
      intro x hx h; exact this (h ▸ hx)
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuousOn_id.pow 2)
      intro x hx h; exact this (pow_eq_zero h ▸ hx)
